name: prompt-engineering
description: Turn a plain-language description into an optimized, concise LLM prompt, ready to paste into a Gemini Gem, Claude Project, or custom GPT, or to refine an existing one. Grounded in the promptingguide.ai prompt-engineering guide (elements of a prompt, role prompting, delimiters, few-shot, chain-of-thought, structured output), with a bundled distilled reference so it works fully offline and the NotebookLM MCP used for live source material when connected. Returns only the finished prompt. Auto-engages via the 'prompt-engineering' skill whenever you write, generate, optimize, or refine a prompt or system prompt; slash-available as /prompt-engineering:prompt-engineering.
